title: Agent Run Loop (Non-Streamed)
interaction_flow: Caller → Runner: run(starting_agent, input, context, max_turns, run_config)
Runner → Runner: normalize input; init current_turn=0, generated_items=[], context_wrapper
Runner → Runner: create RunState, task_span, SandboxRuntime
--- WHILE LOOP (each iteration = one turn) ---
Runner → Runner: CHECK current_turn >= max_turns → raise MaxTurnsExceeded (or invoke error_handler)
Runner [turn==0] → InputGuardrail: run_input_guardrails(agent, guardrails, input, context_wrapper)
InputGuardrail → Runner: InputGuardrailResult[] (or raises InputGuardrailTripwireTriggered)
Runner → run_single_turn: run_single_turn(bindings, all_tools, original_input, generated_items, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, ...)
run_single_turn → RunHooks/AgentHooks: on_agent_start(context, agent) [if first turn or after handoff]
run_single_turn → Agent: get_system_prompt(context_wrapper) → str | None
run_single_turn → Agent: get_prompt(context_wrapper) → ResponsePromptParam | None
run_single_turn → Agent: get_handoffs(execution_agent, context_wrapper) → list[Handoff]
run_single_turn → run_single_turn: _prepare_turn_input_items(original_input, generated_items, reasoning_id_policy) → list[TResponseInputItem]
run_single_turn → get_new_response: get_new_response(bindings, system_prompt, input, output_schema, all_tools, handoffs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, ...)
get_new_response → get_new_response: maybe_filter_model_input(agent, run_config, context_wrapper, input_items, system_instructions) → ModelInputData
get_new_response → get_new_response: deduplicate_input_items_preferring_latest(filtered.input)
get_new_response → get_new_response: get_model(execution_agent, run_config) → Model
get_new_response → get_new_response: resolve model_settings; maybe_reset_tool_choice(agent, tool_use_tracker, model_settings)
get_new_response → RunHooks/AgentHooks: on_llm_start(context_wrapper, agent, instructions, input)

get_new_response → Model: get_response_with_retry(λ→model.get_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing, previous_response_id, conversation_id, prompt))
Model → get_new_response: ModelResponse (output items + usage)
get_new_response → get_new_response: context_wrapper.usage.add(new_response.usage)
get_new_response → RunHooks/AgentHooks: on_llm_end(context_wrapper, agent, new_response)
get_new_response → run_single_turn: return ModelResponse

run_single_turn → get_single_step_result_from_response: get_single_step_result_from_response(bindings, original_input, pre_step_items, new_response, output_schema, all_tools, handoffs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, ...)
get_single_step_result_from_response → process_model_response: process_model_response(agent, all_tools, response, output_schema, handoffs, existing_items) → ProcessedResponse
process_model_response → get_single_step_result_from_response: ProcessedResponse (new_items, run_handoffs, functions, tools_used, interruptions, ...)
get_single_step_result_from_response → get_single_step_result_from_response: tool_use_tracker.record_processed_response(agent, processed_response)

get_single_step_result_from_response → execute_tools_and_side_effects: execute_tools_and_side_effects(bindings, original_input, pre_step_items, new_response, processed_response, output_schema, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, ...)
execute_tools_and_side_effects → execute_tools_and_side_effects: _build_plan_for_fresh_turn(processed_response, agent, context_wrapper, approval_items)

execute_tools_and_side_effects → execute_tools_and_side_effects: _execute_tool_plan(plan, bindings, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config) → (function_results, computer_results, custom_tool_results, shell_results, ...)
execute_tools_and_side_effects → execute_tools_and_side_effects: _build_tool_result_items(function_results, ...) → new_step_items
execute_tools_and_side_effects → execute_tools_and_side_effects: _collect_tool_interruptions(...) → interruptions
--- BRANCH: interruptions present ---
execute_tools_and_side_effects [interruptions] → get_single_step_result_from_response: SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepInterruption)
--- BRANCH: handoffs present ---
execute_tools_and_side_effects [handoffs] → execute_handoffs: execute_handoffs(public_agent, original_input, pre_step_items, new_step_items, run_handoffs, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, ...)
execute_handoffs → execute_tools_and_side_effects: SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepHandoff(new_agent))
--- BRANCH: tool produces final output ---
execute_tools_and_side_effects → _maybe_finalize_from_tool_results: check ToolsToFinalOutputResult
_maybe_finalize_from_tool_results → execute_tools_and_side_effects: SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepFinalOutput) | None
--- BRANCH: no tools remain, text output present ---
execute_tools_and_side_effects → execute_final_output: execute_final_output(agent, original_input, new_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, final_output, hooks, context_wrapper, ...)
execute_final_output → RunHooks/AgentHooks: run_final_output_hooks(agent, hooks, context_wrapper, final_output) → on_agent_end
execute_final_output → execute_tools_and_side_effects: SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepFinalOutput(output))
--- BRANCH: tools ran but no final output yet ---
execute_tools_and_side_effects → get_single_step_result_from_response: SingleStepResult(next_step=NextStepRunAgain)
--- Back in Runner loop: inspect turn_result.next_step ---
Runner [NextStepFinalOutput] → OutputGuardrail: run_output_guardrails(agent, guardrails, output, context_wrapper)
OutputGuardrail → Runner: OutputGuardrailResult[] (or raises OutputGuardrailTripwireTriggered)
Runner [NextStepFinalOutput] → Caller: return RunResult(final_output, generated_items, model_responses)
Runner [NextStepInterruption] → Caller: return RunState (for human-in-the-loop / resume)
Runner [NextStepHandoff] → Runner: current_agent = next_step.new_agent; current_turn++; continue loop
Runner [NextStepRunAgain] → Runner: current_turn++; continue loop

key_data_objects.ProcessedResponse: new_items, run_handoffs, functions, computer_actions, tools_used, interruptions
key_data_objects.SingleStepResult: original_input, model_response, pre_step_items, new_step_items, next_step, tool_guardrail_results, output_guardrail_results
key_data_objects.RunState: serializable state for resume; holds current_turn, generated_items, current_agent

key_relationships: Runner.run() calls run_single_turn() in a while-True loop
execute_tools_and_side_effects() calls _execute_tool_plan() and routes to execute_handoffs / execute_final_output / NextStepRunAgain
RunHooks and AgentHooks fire at: on_agent_start, on_llm_start, on_llm_end, on_agent_end (on_tool_start/end inside tool execution)
InputGuardrails run only on turn==0 (unless resuming)
OutputGuardrails run only when NextStepFinalOutput is reached
important_notes: Non-streamed path: run_single_turn() is called; streamed path uses run_single_turn_streamed()
max_turns default is DEFAULT_MAX_TURNS; exceeding raises MaxTurnsExceeded (overridable via error_handlers={'max_turns': fn})
Tool execution supports: FunctionTool, ComputerTool, CustomTool, ShellTool, ApplyPatchTool, LocalShellTool, HostedMCPTool
Approvals/interruptions produce NextStepInterruption → Runner returns RunState for pause/resume (human-in-the-loop)
Handoffs update current_agent and increment turn (full loop re-entry with new agent)
Session persistence: input saved before loop; output items saved after each turn
call_model_input_filter applied inside get_new_response via maybe_filter_model_input()
reasoning_item_id_policy controls whether reasoning item IDs are preserved or omitted across turns
